name: hyro-cloud
description: HYRO Cloud — The Operating System for Autonomous Agents. Deploy. Connect. Remember. Execute.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @hyro/core && npm run build -w @hyro/sdk && npm run build -w @hyro/mcp-base && npm run build -w @hyro/api && npm run build -w hyro
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @hyro/core && npm run build -w @hyro/sdk && npm run dev -w @hyro/api
scripts.dev:cli: npm run build -w @hyro/core && npm run build -w @hyro/sdk && npm run dev -w hyro
scripts.cli:publish: npm run build -w hyro && npm publish -w hyro --access public
scripts.cli:publish:dry: npm run build -w hyro && npm publish -w hyro --access public --dry-run
